'nuff said...

Alice Zuberg is one of the main characters in the Alicization Arc and a supporting character in the Unital Ring Arc.

She is the daughter of Rulid Village's chief Gasupht Zuberg, as well as the childhood friend of Eugeo and Kirito. Due to accidentally breaking a clause of the Taboo Index in her childhood, Alice was apprehended by Deusolbert Synthesis Seven and taken to the Central Cathedral, where she was forced to become an Integrity Knight, named Alice Synthesis Thirty, with her memories sealed.

You're a Intergity Knight, so yeah. you might be either a OC, Eydis or sum shi
